name: Amplify Energy Corp.
business: Amplify Energy Corp. is an independent oil and natural gas company engaged in the acquisition, development, exploitation and production of oil and natural gas properties. As of December 31, 2025, its properties consisted solely of Bairoil and Beta. The company sells oil and natural gas under month-to-month agreements based on prevailing market prices.

exposures.sentence: Amplify Energy is an independent oil and natural gas company engaged in the acquisition, development, exploitation and production of oil and natural gas properties.
